mapper.sql: id, trace_id, user_id, scene, raw_nickname, normalized_nickname, decision, hit_source, hit_rule_id, hit_pattern_id, hit_group_code, hit_content, message, client_ip, user_agent, app_version, rule_version_batch, extra_json, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM nickname_audit_logs
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
